授業目的: 授業目的：学生は、「英語BⅠ」で習得したリスニングおよびスピーキングの技能を基礎として、より発展的な英語の運用能力を身につけることを目的とする。やや長い文章を含む会話や、より幅広く複雑な表現や構文に触れることを通して、英語を理解し、伝える力を高める。また、段落構成に基づいた英文を書くための基礎的な能力を養成し、話す・聞く・書く技能を統合的に伸ばすことを目指す。
到達目標: 到達目標：学生は、効果的に会話を行うために必要な基本的な社交性や対人コミュニケーション能力を身につけ、それを用いて自分の履歴や過去の経験について説明し、自分の意見を明確に述べ、将来の計画について英語で話すことができるようになる。英語の音声的特徴に対する理解を深め、音の弱化、同化、省略などの主要な連接音を聞き取り、適切に発話できるようになる。ライティングにおいて、主題文と補足文の関係を理解し、それに基づいた論理的で分かりやすい段落構成の英文を書くことができるようになる。
授業方法: Activities will include discussions, games, peer review of writing assignments, along with online activities. Students will work in pairs, groups, and individually.

【Startup Week】URL: https://************
Online Class (On-Demand Format) / 《90 minutes》
Class Introduction and Vocabulary Program Orientation
第2回:
【Core Weeks①】
Face-to-face Class /  《90 minutes》
Further introduction to the course. Class goal: Students will be able to review how to access the on line videos and listening exercises used in the coarse. Gain an understanding of the course’s goals, writing, assignments, grading, and expectations of the class. In addition, students will be able to use material from the spring semester to discuss the break with their classmates.

Homework handout with the Video “The Wienerlypics”. The outside class study time is planned for about 2 hours per week. All handouts will be posted on Luna one week before the class. This homework is due before the 2nd class.

【Flex Hours】
Online Class (Task-oriented Format) / 《180 minutes》
Students should independently review and learn the assigned words in the English Central Vocab Builder application (approximately 495 words)
第4回:

Face-to-face Class /  《90 minutes》
Daily routines; present tenses, Unit 8 cooking. Speaking goals: Students will be able to describe their day and ask their classmates about theirs. In addition, students will be able to tell how to make a dish. Written goal creating good supporting sentences for a topic sentence.

Prepare for pg.38 #1; check vocabulary pg. 38 #2. pg.39 #4; prepare to do number 5 orally in class with a partner. Listening pg. 40, 10 out of 15; and handout. And first letter telling me about your summer break due. The outside class study time is planned for about 2 hours per week. All handouts will be posted on Luna one week before the class. Please finish the homework before the class.

Past tenses; time expressions (Unit 12) Ghost story. Goal: Placing an event in a temporal relationship to another event. Written goals creating good supporting sentences for a topic sentence continued.
